scripts.start: NODE_ENV=production TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.json DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=apps/fact-server/.env node -r tsconfig-paths/register -r @swc-node/register -r dotenv/config ./src/main.ts
scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development TS_NODE_PROJECT=../../tsconfig.base.json TSCONFIG_PATHS_CONFIG_DIR=../.. node --watch --enable-source-maps -r tsconfig-paths/register -r @swc-node/register -r dotenv/config ./src/main.ts
scripts.test:e2e:coverage: rm -rf ../../.coverage/e2e-server && mkdir -p ../../.coverage/e2e-server/v8 && NODE_OPTIONS= NODE_V8_COVERAGE=../../.coverage/e2e-server/v8 node --test --test-concurrency=1 ../../tests/e2e/server.e2e.test.mjs && pnpm dlx c8 report --temp-directory ../../.coverage/e2e-server/v8 --reports-dir ../../.coverage/e2e-server --reporter=text-summary --reporter=lcov --reporter=json-summary --include "apps/fact-server/src/**" --exclude "**/*.test.*" --exclude "tests/**"
